task: Put one marble on the window seal
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS -** A white marble is on a white table. A black robotic arm is present. The marble is a small, spherical object. STRATEGY - The marble must be picked up and placed on the window seal. The marble is on the table, so the first step is to reach and grasp it. The destination is the window seal, which is a flat surface. Failure modes include dropping the marble or not grasping it. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the marble on the table; Step 2 grasp the marble for transport; Step 3 transport to the window seal; Step 4 place the marble on the window seal.

Goal: on(marble, window_seal)
Scene: marble, table, window_seal
Step 1: reach(marble)
  affordance_region: the body of the marble
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, marble, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, marble) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(marble)
  affordance_region: the body of the marble
  contact: holding(marble) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(marble)
Step 3: transport(marble -> window_seal)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the window seal
  spatial: above(marble, window_seal, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(marble)
  done_when: above(marble, window_seal, 0.05)
Step 4: place(marble -> window_seal)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the window seal
  contact: surface_contact(marble, window_seal) [completion]; released(marble) [completion]
  pose: stable(marble) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(marble, window_seal) AND released(marble)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: an empty area on the window seal
an empty area on the window seal
